series_metadata.series_title: Public Employer (PE) Injury, Occupational Illness and Accident Statistical Records
series_metadata.series_description: This schedule relates to the collection and compilation of statistical data submitted by PEs to Public Employment Risk Reduction Program (PERRP) regarding the cause and prevention of injuries, occupational illnesses and accidents to public employees.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: data has been entered into reporting database ; Electronic: data a minimum of , possibly indefinitely pursuant adopted OSHA recordkeeping standards
